items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14092 White Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series key pouch is made of monogram coated canvas and features playful rainbow tones, inspired by the passionate and lively aesthetics of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The key pouch has clean lines and can easily fit into a handbag or pocket. It has an internal hook to hold six keys and is securely fastened with a gold snap button. 12 x 7 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14163 Black & Colorful】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series Victorine wallet is small and exquisite. The colorful Monogram pattern reinterprets the classic logo with the famous rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The wallet is made of coated canvas, featuring a refined calfskin lining and silver hardware, with a zippered coin pocket and multiple compartments inside for bills and business cards. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Passport Cover Wallet】m62089 83519 Monogram (Badge)
items.name_cn:
【Passport Cover Wallet】m62089 83519 Monogram (Badge)
This passport cover is part of the Flight Mode collection, celebrating the spirit of travel. Made from monogram canvas, it features vintage hotel labels selected from the extensive collection gathered by Louis Vuitton's grandson Gaston-Louis in the early 20th century. The leather-lined lid also includes four card slots.
Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 【Passport Holder】M64502 62089 Black/Floral (Vintage)
items.name_cn:
【Passport Holder】M64502 62089 Black/Floral (Vintage)
The slender design fits neatly into various pockets, exuding the charm of the 'Portefeuille Slender'. Made from brushed Monogram calfskin, it has a treasure-like expression. The worn leather patina and faded Monogram pattern evoke a depth reminiscent of a life lived through time. With 4 card slots and a bill compartment, it is perfect for daily use.
Size: 10.0x14.0x2.0 cm
